RPi.GPIO==0.7.1
spidev==3.5
Pillow>=10.0.0
numpy>=1.24.0
rich>=13.0.0
pandas>=2.0.0
netifaces==0.11.0
ping3>=4.0.0
get-mac>=0.9.0
paramiko>=3.0.0
smbprotocol>=1.10.0
pysmb>=1.2.0
pymysql>=1.0.0
sqlalchemy>=1.4.0
python-nmap>=0.7.0
# NOTE: flask-socketio's default manage_session=True is INCOMPATIBLE with
# Werkzeug >= 3.1 (which Flask >= 3.1 pulls in): its connect path assigns
# ctx.session, now read-only -> AttributeError on every socket connect, which
# silently kills all real-time updates. webapp_modern.py constructs SocketIO with
# manage_session=False to avoid this; do not remove that without re-testing sockets.
flask>=3.0.0
flask-socketio>=5.3.0
flask-cors>=4.0.0
psutil>=5.9.0
logger>=1.4
openai>=2.0.0
cryptography>=41.0.0
python-prctl>=1.8.1
pisugar>=1.0.0
smbus2>=0.4.0
luma.led_matrix>=1.3.0
luma.core>=2.4.0
